title: Surfaced item — manifest line
description: One JSON line per repliable item. Digests write it; the reply processor reads today's and yesterday's manifests to resolve a reply by handle.

handle.description: Namespaced + stable for the day, e.g. W3 (WhatsApp), I2 (intake), M1 (iMessage), P4 (day-plan).

source.description: The originating agent's tag, e.g. whatsapp, gmail, intake-scan.

verbatim.description: Full text lives in the channel archive; the SMS carries only summary + one quote.

suggested_due.description: ISO date, or null for backlog.

reminder_id.description: Set only when the item already maps to a reminder, so it can be completed or rescheduled.
